headline: Novavax (NVAX) Up 10.4% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Novavax (NVAX) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Why Is Moderna (MRNA) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of biotechnology company Moderna (NASDAQ:MRNA) jumped 5.1% in the afternoon session after the stock's positive momentum was extended as the company, along with partner Merck, presented positive long-term data for its personalized mRNA-based cancer vaccine.
